title: Models – Chat Completions
description: OpenAI Chat Completions model, request/response converter, stream handler, and helpers

classes.name: OpenAIChatCompletionsModel
methods: __init__(model: str|ChatModel, openai_client: AsyncOpenAI, should_replay_reasoning_content: ShouldReplayReasoningContent|None) -> None
get_response(system_instructions, input, model_settings, tools, output_schema, handoffs, tracing, previous_response_id, conversation_id, prompt) -> ModelResponse
stream_response(system_instructions, input, model_settings, tools, output_schema, handoffs, tracing, previous_response_id, conversation_id, prompt) -> AsyncIterator[TResponseStreamEvent]

classes.name: Converter
methods: items_to_messages(items: str|Iterable[TResponseInputItem], model, preserve_thinking_blocks, preserve_tool_output_all_content, base_url, should_replay_reasoning_content) -> list[ChatCompletionMessageParam]

classes.name: ChatCmplStreamHandler
methods: handle_stream(response: Response, stream: AsyncStream[ChatCompletionChunk], model: str|None) -> AsyncIterator[TResponseStreamEvent]

classes.name: ChatCmplHelpers
methods: get_stream_options_param(client: AsyncOpenAI, model_settings: ModelSettings, stream: bool) -> dict|None

classes.name: Model
classes.note: Abstract base class for all model implementations

relationships: OpenAIChatCompletionsModel depends_on Converter  (calls items_to_messages, convert_tool_choice, convert_response_format, tool_to_openai, convert_handoff_tool, message_to_output_items, maybe_easy_input_message, maybe_input_message, _normalize_input_content_part_alias)
OpenAIChatCompletionsModel depends_on ChatCmplStreamHandler  (calls handle_stream in stream_response)
OpenAIChatCompletionsModel depends_on ChatCmplHelpers  (calls is_openai, get_store_param, get_stream_options_param, convert_logprobs_for_output_text)
ChatCmplStreamHandler uses StreamingState  (instantiates per handle_stream call)
ChatCmplStreamHandler uses SequenceNumber  (instantiates per handle_stream call)
ChatCmplStreamHandler depends_on ChatCmplHelpers  (calls convert_logprobs_for_text_delta, convert_logprobs_for_output_text, clean_gemini_tool_call_id)
Converter depends_on ShouldReplayReasoningContent  (callable hook injected via items_to_messages)
Converter depends_on ReasoningContentReplayContext  (builds for replay hook invocation)

non_streaming: _fetch_response: Converter.items_to_messages → insert system msg → Converter.convert_tool_choice → Converter.convert_response_format → Converter.tool_to_openai (per tool) → Converter.convert_handoff_tool (per handoff) → ChatCmplHelpers.get_store_param → ChatCmplHelpers.get_stream_options_param → client.chat.completions.create()
streaming: stream_response: ChatCmplStreamHandler.handle_stream(response, stream, model) → yields TResponseStreamEvent chunks
handle_stream: per chunk → emit ResponseCreatedEvent, handle reasoning/text/refusal/tool_calls via StreamingState → emit ResponseCompletedEvent
converter_items_to_messages: FunctionCall/FileSearchCall → appended to current assistant tool_calls
ReasoningItem → reconstruct thinking blocks (Anthropic) or pending_reasoning_content (DeepSeek)

important_notes: OpenAIChatCompletionsModel wraps the Chat Completions API but normalizes output to the Responses API type system (Response, ResponseOutputItem, etc.) using FAKE_RESPONSES_ID placeholders.
ChatCmplStreamHandler translates raw ChatCompletionChunk stream events into Responses API streaming events (ResponseTextDeltaEvent, ResponseOutputItemAddedEvent, etc.).
Converter supports multi-provider reasoning: Anthropic (thinking_blocks/encrypted signatures), DeepSeek/third-party (reasoning_content/delta.reasoning), Gemini (thought_signature in provider_data).
ChatCmplHelpers.is_openai() gates store param and stream usage defaults to official OpenAI endpoints only.
HEADERS_OVERRIDE is a ContextVar allowing per-request header injection without mutating the client.
MCPToolChoice raises UserError – not supported on Chat Completions backend.
Compaction items raise UserError – only supported on Responses API.
Logprobs flow: raw ChatCompletionTokenLogprob → ChatCmplHelpers.convert_logprobs_for_output_text → Logprob list → attached to ResponseOutputText.logprobs.
external_dependencies: openai.types.responses.Response, ResponseOutputMessage, ResponseOutputText, ResponseFunctionToolCall, ResponseReasoningItem, ResponseUsage

openai.types.responses streaming events: ResponseCreatedEvent, ResponseCompletedEvent, ResponseTextDeltaEvent, ResponseOutputItemAddedEvent/DoneEvent, ResponseContentPartAddedEvent/DoneEvent, ResponseFunctionCallArgumentsDeltaEvent, ResponseReasoningSummary* events
